text:
The Armored Titan is one of the Titans that appear in and attacks the .

Story

, and fight against Titans in , including the Armored Titan. deduces that the weak spot of the enemies is their nape as kills one of the Titans by targeting this point.

Trivia

The Armored Titan shows no signs of the intelligence, special abilities, or fighting techniques characteristic of its original manga counterpart, and seems to be mindless.
